pages.title: About Us | Sleaford & North Hykeham
pages.meta_description: The role of the Sleaford and North Hykeham Conservative Association (SNHCA) is to promote Conservatism within our parliamentary constituency area. This means using our resources to communicate with the electorate and to support Conservative Candidates who are seeking to become Town, District and County Councillors and Members of both the Westminster and European Parliaments. The Chairman and Association officers are elected at the Annual General Meeting (AGM) - these positions are all voluntary and unpaid.
headings: h3: Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservative Association
pages.text_excerpt: About Us | Sleaford & North Hykeham Skip to main content Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservatives Main navigation About Us Get involved News People Events Contact Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservatives About Us Tweet The role of the Sleaford and North Hykeham Conservative Association (SNHCA) is to promote Conservatism within our parliamentary constituency area. This means using our resources to communicate with the electorate and to support Conservative Candidates who are seeking to become Town, District and County Councillors and Members of both the Westminster and European Parliaments. The Chairman and Association officers are elected at the Annual General Meeting (AGM) - these positions are all voluntary and unpaid. The Constituency area includes the administrative areas of North Kesteven District Council where the Conservatives are the largest political group and a part of South Kesteven District Council (to the North and West of Grantham) where Conservative Councillors are in the majority. The Constituency is wholly within the Conservative controlled Lincolnshire County Council administrative area. Our aim is to provide current information about the constituency and to promote interest in our Association and the Conservative Party. Our website helps us to do this and you will find lots of useful information in it about who we are, what we do, how to contact us links which you can use to keep up to date with latest Conservative News and Stories. We are always pleased to welcome new members and anyone who wishes to assist in the promotion of Conservatism. If you have any comments then please feel free to email us at [email protected] About Us EXECUTIVE COUNCIL Our Map Clubs Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservative Association Footer About RSS Accessibility Cookies Privacy About Us Get a postal vote Get involved Young Conservatives Promoted by Ian Carrington on behalf of Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservative Association, both at PO Box 11284 Sleaford NG34 4FW Copyright 2026 Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservative Association. All rights reserved. Powered by Bluetree

pages.title: Get involved | Sleaford & North Hykeham
pages.meta_description: To become a member of Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservative Association means that you have joined the most open and democratic political party in Britain. Any person living in the United Kingdom is eligible to join the Conservative Party.
headings: h3: Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservative Association
pages.text_excerpt: Get involved | Sleaford & North Hykeham Skip to main content Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservatives Main navigation About Us Get involved News People Events Contact Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservatives Get involved Tweet To become a member of Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservative Association means that you have joined the most open and democratic political party in Britain. Any person living in the United Kingdom is eligible to join the Conservative Party. Applicants are not required to be registered voters or UK nationals, and there is no upper or lower age limit on membership, although children under the age of 15 cannot be enrolled as full voting members. For just £25 (or £5 if you are under 23) annually, you will be eligible to elect the Conservative candidates for Parliamentary and local government elections, vote in Party Leadership elections, be invited to attend our Party Conferences. Armed Forces Membership is offered at a reduced rate of £15, and is available to any individual who has served or is currently serving in the Regular or Territorial Forces. However, some restrictions on political activity apply to those currently serving in the Armed Forces - details on request. The easiest way to join is to use the main website at www.conservatives.com and select option 'join'. Alternatively, you can call 020 7222 9000 for further help and advice on the options for making your payment. 200 Club Support your local association and join the SNHCA 200 Club Numbers cost £20 each. Pay by BACS / Standing Order or Cheque. There is an annual prize draw of £600, two of £325 and two of £175. The main prizes are drawn by our MP Dr Caroline Johnson at a free annual supper for 200 Club members in October. Contact Anne Dixon to purchase your numbers while they are still available: Email: [email protected] , phone: 01522 810215 Get involved Join Young Conservatives Get a postal vote Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservative Association Footer About RSS Accessibility Cookies Privacy About Us Get a postal vote Get involved Young Conservatives Promoted by Ian Carrington on behalf of Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservative Association, both at PO Box 11284 Sleaford NG34 4FW Copyright 2026 Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservative Association.
